data.title: Implement ts-morph-add-parameter.mjs (cross-file caller update via ts-morph reference graph)
data.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Description
Implement plugins/dso/scripts/recipe-adapters/ts-morph-add-parameter.mjs — Node.js ES module that uses ts-morph to add a parameter to a TypeScript function and update all callers across the project.

### Implementation:
- Read RECIPE_PARAM_FILE (path to file with target function), RECIPE_PARAM_FUNCTION (qualified function name), RECIPE_PARAM_NAME, RECIPE_PARAM_TYPE, RECIPE_PARAM_DEFAULT (optional), RECIPE_WORKING_DIR (project root, defaults to cwd)
- Load ts-morph Project from tsconfig.json in RECIPE_WORKING_DIR (support composite projects via addSourceFilesFromTsConfig or project references)
- Use ts-morph ChangeSignature or direct AST manipulation to add parameter to target function
- Find all callers across the project using findReferencesAsNodes() and update call sites
- Output JSON to stdout: {files_changed: [paths], transforms_applied: N, errors: [], exit_code: 0}
- On error: {files_changed: [], transforms_applied: 0, errors: ["message"], exit_code: 1}
- Idempotent: if parameter already exists, output files_changed:[], transforms_applied:0, exit_code:0 (no-op)

### Node.js requirements:
- ES module (.mjs) using import syntax
- Requires ts-morph: import {Project} from 'ts-morph'
- Find ts-morph in node_modules under RECIPE_WORKING_DIR or fall back to global; if not found exit with error JSON

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] plugins/dso/scripts/recipe-adapters/ts-morph-add-parameter.mjs exists
  Verify: test -f plugins/dso/scripts/recipe-adapters/ts-morph-add-parameter.mjs
- [ ] Valid Node.js syntax (no parse errors)
  Verify: node --input-type=module --eval "import './plugins/dso/scripts/recipe-adapters/ts-morph-add-parameter.mjs'" 2>&1 | grep -v "No RECIPE_PARAM_FILE" || true
- [ ] All tests in test-ts-morph-add-parameter.sh pass (when ts-morph installed)
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-ts-morph-add-parameter.sh
- [ ] Script handles missing ts-morph gracefully (outputs error JSON, exits non-zero)
  Verify: NODE_PATH=/nonexistent node plugins/dso/scripts/recipe-adapters/ts-morph-add-parameter.mjs 2>/dev/null; true
